description: If you love those dashing divas in the playboy centrefolds, you'll love the cool, casual range of footwear from this cheeky brand! Suitable for the suitably dashing young man-about-town, wear these to impress the girls, while keeping your feet nice and comfy. We recommend wearing these shoes with a clean-look pair of denims from lee and a cool printed tee to leave no doubt about your fashion credibility. Upper Leather upper with overlays and leather inner for enhanced breathability Patent leather overlays on the side panels and two straps over the midfoot with velcro closures for a snug and customised Fit Padded tongue and collar for all-day comfort Midsole Mildly padded leather footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPU outsole with upraised lugs and branding on the fore-foot and heel for durability, grip and traction Outsole stuck onto the upper shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
